title: Formula Set Value To Other Column
excerpt: May I ask, what formula will I use when I want to set value in a number column based on the value of a formula column. Like in Column C (Formula Column) set Column B (Number column) = Column A (Formula Column).

posts.author: philip.roque (Roque)
posts.cookedHtml: May I ask, what formula will I use when I want to set value in a number column based on the value of a formula column. Like in Column C (Formula Column) set Column B (Number column) = Column A (Formula Column).

posts.author: Marius.Manic (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml:
A. You could put the formula in the number column directly or
B. There are apps that copy the values between columns.

posts.author: arnoldprasad (Arnold P)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Marius, could you kindly post a link to those apps? I checked the marketplace and couldn’t find anything that works.

Thank you.

posts.author: Cherryl_JetPack (Cherryl @ Jetpack)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Arnold,
You can use VLOOKUP app to copy values between columns.

If you need any assistance with VLOOKUP, don’t hesitate to contact our dedicated support team at appsupport@jetpackapps.co. Our team is always happy to help you with any queries or concerns.

Regards,
Cherryl

posts.author: arnoldprasad (Arnold P)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Cherryl. Will check it out. I was able to find a programmer to write some scripts to assist in the migration of a CRM to Monday but the app looks interesting.

posts.author: ripaus (Pablo)
posts.cookedHtml:
